shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/.codex/skills/.system/nowledge-mem/search-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo ---\\n' && pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g 'package.json' -g '*combobox*' -g '*select*' -g '*highlight*' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- git ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "downshift useCombobox useSelect initialHighlightedIndex defaultHighlightedIndex isItemDisabled" --space default'
/bin/bash -lc "rg --files src | sort | head -240; printf '\\npackage scripts\\n'; sed -n '1,180p' package.json"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function getNonDisabledIndex|const getNonDisabledIndex|export.*getNonDisabledIndex\" src/utils.js; sed -n '300,420p' src/utils.js; sed -n '630,690p' src/hooks/utils.js"

/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "isItemDisabled" src/hooks/utils.js src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useSelect/index.js | head -80; rg -n "const defaultProps|defaultProps =" src/hooks/utils.js src/utils.js'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,100p' src/hooks/useCombobox/utils.js; sed -n '1,90p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js; sed -n '1,75p' src/hooks/useSelect/testUtils.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,35p' src/hooks/utils.js; sed -n '1,35p' src/hooks/useSelect/utils.ts; rg -n \"getInitialStateCommon|initial state|highlightedIndex on open\" src/hooks/__tests__/utils.test.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/utils.test.js src/hooks/useSelect/__tests__/utils.test.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' /home/user/.codex/plugins/cache/nowledge-community/nowledge-mem/0.1.28/skills/distill-memory/SKILL.md; git status --short; git diff --stat; git diff --check"

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "In Downshift, useCombobox and useSelect share getHighlightedIndexOnOpen in src/hooks/utils.js. Configured initialHighlightedIndex and defaultHighlightedIndex candidates must be validated with isItemDisabled before selection; invalid candidates fall through to selected-item or enabled directional fallback. The fix is covered by shared utility tests and both hook toggle-button suites." -t "Downshift disabled initial highlight fallback" --unit-type learning -l downshift -s codex -i 0.7'
